tool.quickEntryHint: Select a key, then type characters — each fills the key and advances to the next
inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.noSelection: Select a key to inspect it.
inspector.editLockedHint: Switch the dead state back to ‘none’ to edit this key.
keyeditor.title: Edit key {{code}}
find.noMatch: No key outputs "{{q}}" in this layer
xml.intro: Live preview of the generated .keylayout XML. Toggle whether non-ASCII output is encoded as code points, copy it, and fix any validation issues on the right.
validation.title: Validation
modifiers.title: Modifier map
modifiers.note: Each row maps a physical modifier combination to a keymap index. ‘?’ marks an optional modifier; ‘any’ matches either side.
deadkeys.title: Dead keys & actions
deadkeys.intro: A dead key enters a state instead of typing; the next keystroke completes it (e.g. ´ then a → á). Edit each state's terminator — the character produced if nothing valid follows. To create one, right-click a key and choose Make dead key.
deadkeys.noActions: No actions yet. Use Make Dead Key on a key.
bundle.title: Bundle
bundle.intro: A .bundle is the portable macOS keyboard package — one or more .keylayout files, an Info.plist, and translated display names wrapped into a single drop-in folder.
bundle.name: Name
bundle.standaloneNote: This document is a single .keylayout — exporting wraps it into a one-layout bundle automatically.
bundle.contentsHelp: Files Keymano writes into the bundle when you export it.
bundle.install.title: Install on macOS
bundle.install.web1: Unzip the downloaded file — your .bundle folder pops out.
bundle.install.web2: Move the .bundle into ~/Library/Keyboard Layouts/ (in Finder press ⌘⇧G to jump there).
bundle.install.web3: Open System Settings → Keyboard → Input Sources, click +, pick your layout. If it doesn't appear, log out and back in.
bundle.install.desktop1: Click Install on the editor toolbar — Keymano copies the bundle into ~/Library/Keyboard Layouts/ for you.
bundle.install.desktop2: Open System Settings → Keyboard → Input Sources, click +, pick your layout.
